75510.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 5
75510.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-5-oleh-bezuhlyi-rvhzf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BFeLD0tfKQymx6%2BKNZ8Q22Q%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0TAthfZCQMwIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr7ztblx~rl-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr7ztblx-rl
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Bitcoin and Ether are clawing back from multi-year lows as ETF buyers return, even as regulators tighten their grip on stablecoins and prediction markets, and Bitcoin's own community squares off over a contentious protocol upgrade. 📈 Bitcoin, Ether Rally as ETF Buyers Return Bitcoin and Ether bounced off multi-year lows as dip buyers stepped back into the market. Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a $221 million inflow on July 2, signaling renewed institutional appetite after weeks of extreme-fear sentiment. Read full story 🏛️ SEC's Atkins Touts "Historic Steps" Toward On-Chain Markets SEC Chairman Paul Atkins said the agency is accelerating efforts to modernize US financial markets by moving them on-chain. His remarks, delivered at an economic policy event, align with the administration's push to position the US as a leading crypto hub. More details 🏦 BIS: Stablecoins Can't Function Without Central Banks The Bank for International Settlements argued that stablecoins ultimately depend on central bank infrastructure to operate reliably. The report frames that reliance as a risk to monetary sovereignty and calls for tighter, unified oversight of the sector. Read more ⚙️ Bitcoin's BIP-110 Fork Fight Hits an August Deadline A brewing dispute over Bitcoin's proposed BIP-110 upgrade is forcing exchanges, wallets, and mining pools to declare their positions ahead of an August lock-in window. Miner support currently sits at a thin 0.42%, leaving the fork's fate very much unresolved. See details ⚠️ Polymarket Faces Scrutiny Over Deceptive Marketing Polymarket is facing allegations that it used fake trades and paid influencers to inflate its platform's visibility. The claims could invite fresh regulatory attention to prediction markets, a sector already under pressure from EU regulators. Read full story 🇧🇷 Brazil's Central Bank Proposes Stablecoin Transfer Holds Brazil's central bank is proposing mandatory 24-hour holds on large dollar-stablecoin transfers as part of new compliance measures. The rule would primarily affect cross-border transactions and could raise costs for service providers operating in the country. More details 🏢 Securitize Tokenizes $295M in Stock on Solana at IPO Securitize brought $295 million worth of stock onto Solana as part of a fresh IPO, marking one of the network's largest tokenized-equit

75382.subject: Important updates to your MetaMask CL Card agreements
75382.body:
Important Update Regarding Your Card 
Dear Oleh

We’re reaching out to let you know about a small, behind-the-scenes update to 
the providers that support your MetaMask CL Card. First, the good news: there’s 
nothing you need to do. Your card and the way you use your account all stay 
exactly the same. We just believe you should always know who’s looking after 
your account. Here’s what’s changing, and why:

From 1 July 2026, the crypto-asset services in your account will be powered by 
MoonPay Europe B.V., a crypto-asset service provider authorized under the EU 
Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA) by the Netherlands Authority for the 
Financial Markets (AFM). Your card and payments providers continue unchanged.

This change does not alter the terms of your agreement with us. The updated 
terms that apply to the crypto-asset services are MoonPay’sTerms of Use 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/terms_of_use_europe> and Privacy Policy 
<https://www.moonpay.com/legal/privacy_policy>.

We’re proud to keep powering your MetaMask CL Card.

Questions about this update, or anything else on your account? We’re always 
happy to help at metamask@cl-cards.com <mailto:support@cl-cards.com>.

Need a new card? You can order one in the app in a couple of taps, and don’t 
forget you can delegate and spend straight from your wallet.

Crypto-asset services are provided by MoonPay Europe B.V., authorized by the 
Netherlands Authority for the Financial Markets
(AFM) under Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA). Card and payment services are 
provided by Monavate Ltd, The Officers Mess Business Centre, Royston Road, 
Duxford,Cambridge, England, CB22 4QH
Unsubscribe 
<https://links.cl-cards.com/s/u/SiQ5AD4WG0u6jZlbDv-szh-il9QkEQ71njmDn-dBiCUfN6hxuhb3aQxuoEfI_4dCx_SaHmZg7ZrymRTUDsQfQzJYmGJsICucyuDvBin9LDGcybkapoMmbeTeXCMf11u3MeAA1EK7aQ6BoHaZQv3BRz5n8kQlSQt9aZ6ndM0DQE9t0VKBIW7P_5ZpMv6n/uQhGfkvsprPzLWOPljn1rZz5zHOjmEC5/22>

75349.subject: Re: POZVÁNKA
75349.body:
Dobrý deň,

môžeme 12.30?

S pozdravom

---

Mgr. Michaela Bilá

Head manager Bukovina

+421908 849 791

www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]

Dňa 2026-07-01 18:49 Oleg Novosadov napísal(a):

> Dobry,
> 
> Dakujem pekne za pozvanku. Mohli by sme teda prist  08.07 o 12:00 ?
> 
> Dakujem
> 
> ср, 1 лип. 2026 р., 15:21 користувач BUKOVINA - MICHAELA BILÁ 
> <michaela.bila@bukovinakosice.sk> пише:
> 
>> Dobrý deň naši snúbenci,
>> 
>> rada by som Vás pozvala na osobné stretnutie pred Vašou svadobnou 
>> hostinou, ktorá sa bude konať u nás na Bukovine.
>> Rada by som s Vami prebrala detaily svadby, stretnutie, kde bude 
>> prítomná už aj moja koordinátorka spravidla trvá cca 1,5 hodinky, 
>> prosím pripravte si dostatočné časové okno.
>> Vedeli by ste nám dať časový nástrel stretnutia, aby sme spoločne 
>> našli prienik v kalendároch?
>> Sme na Bukovine viac menej denne od cca 8.00 do 16.30 hod.
>> 
>> Ďakujem!
>> S pozdravom
>> --
>> 
>> Mgr. Michaela Bilá
>> 
>> Head manager Bukovina
>> 
>> +421908 849 791
>> 
>> www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]


Links:
------
[1] http://www.bukovinakosice.sk
